steps.description: Confirm the charge appears twice with identical amount and timestamp within 60 seconds
If customer is enterprise or premium tier, prioritize resolution
Sum the duplicate transaction amounts to determine severity
Use POL-SECURITY-02 thresholds: critical if >$10,000 or >10 customers affected; otherwise proportional
Issue refund for duplicate charge (POL-REFUND-05). If amount is critical, escalate to billing team lead. If medium/high, create refund ticket. Notify customer within 4 hours.
Check customer subscription tier and status
Inspect the disputed transaction amount and date
Use calculate_refund_eligibility tool to determine if refund is allowed
If refund eligible: process refund. If not: explain policy to customer. If exception: escalate to manager.
Report tier, status, industry, and account age
If customer not found, state clearly that no record exists
